Support

Book a Call With Our Team

Talk directly with the VLP team. We'll answer your questions, walk you through the platform, and help you get matched with the right opportunities.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is DVLP and how does it work?

DVLP (Developers VLP) is a developer marketplace that matches freelance developers with vetted U.S. clients. You create a profile, choose a plan, and we connect you with projects that fit your skills and availability.

How much does it cost to join?

We offer a Free plan that gets you listed in the developer directory, and an Intro Track plan at $2.99/mo that includes priority matching, a 1-on-1 intro call, and featured placement. See our pricing page for full details.

How do I get matched with clients?

Once your profile is live, businesses can find you through our directory or submit a request on our Find Developers page. We review each request and match it with developers whose skills and rates align.

Can I set my own rates and choose my projects?

Yes. You set your hourly rate during onboarding and you are free to accept or decline any project introduction. There are no exclusivity requirements.

What happens after I sign up?

Free plan members appear in the developer directory immediately. Intro Track members also get a scheduled 1-on-1 call to refine their profile and receive priority introductions to matching projects.

How do I cancel or change my plan?

Contact us via any of the options below and we will update or cancel your subscription immediately. There are no long-term contracts.
